patches.description: How I ask big questions, build teams to answer them, and practice science openly.
patches.voice_grounding_source: ben-page.json heading ('About Ben') + tagline ('How I ask big questions and who I ask them with'); calibration spec § Ben overview voice (short invitation, 60-100 chars)

patches.description: What does it mean to be on this planet, orbiting our Sun? Answering this question drives my research on the solar wind, the teams I build, and the systems I orchestrate to make breakthroughs inevitable.
I build high-trust teams where questions are celebrated and conflict is a tool—putting the problem on the wall, arguing evidence not intention, and turning team culture into a performance system.
patches.voice_grounding_source: sections/team-ethos excerpt ('I build high-trust teams where questions are celebrated and ownership is real') + paragraphs[0] ('us-against-the-problem approach', 'argue evidence, not intention', 'team culture into a performance system')

patches.description: I help mentees build intuition for meeting problems in alignment with their values—modeling integrity, perseverance, and accountability, and leading with conscious vulnerability so growth stays grounded in personal truth.
patches.voice_grounding_source: sections/mentorship-philosophy excerpt ('I help mentees build intuition for meeting problems in alignment with their values') + paragraphs[1] ('I model integrity, perseverance, discipline, and accountability', 'lead with conscious vulnerability', 'invite them to name and act from personal truth')

patches.description: Open Science is both a practical necessity and an ethical commitment. If you can read my methods, you can rebuild my results—trust earned through verifiable reproducibility, not credentials alone.
patches.voice_grounding_source: sections/open-science paragraphs[0] verbatim opening sentence + 'If you can read my methods, you can rebuild my results' + 'Trust is earned through verifiable reproducibility, not through credentials or reputation alone'

patches.description: Generative AI is a tool under human direction and accountability. I retain authorship and final review over every claim, figure, and line of code—the tool does not bear responsibility. I do.
patches.voice_grounding_source: sections/generative-ai paragraphs[0] ('Generative AI is a tool—powerful and versatile, but always an instrument under human direction and accountability', 'I retain authorship and final review over every claim, figure, and line of code', 'The tool does not bear responsibility—I do')

patches.description: I don't architect prompts. I architect frameworks that encode domain expertise as enforceable rules, making AI collaboration safe, reliable, and trustworthy for scientific work that requires verified correctness.
patches.voice_grounding_source: sections/ai-assisted-development paragraphs[0] ('I don't architect prompts. I architect frameworks that naturally and inherently solve systemic problems') + paragraphs[2] ('encode domain expertise as enforceable rules') + excerpt ('I build infrastructure that makes AI-generated code safe, reliable, and trustworthy')
